inputs.titre: Début de la construction de la Cité Interdite à Pékin

reason: The image shows the beginning of the construction of the Forbidden City in Beijing. While the general architecture and landscape match the historical setting, there are issues with the clothing and overall detail. While the garments appear loosely historical, the uniformity and lack of detail make it feel synthetic and unnatural. The presence of the hat of some workers, even though it can look like chinese traditional hats, gives an industrial vibe, inappropriate in the context. The crowd is too uniform, giving a mass produced impression. In addition, there's an appearance of modern scaffolding in the background, which is also a clear anachronism. The general impression is that it is trying to represent the period, but the details are off.
